# programs.borgmatic

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.borgmatic`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Borgmatic allows for several named backup configurations, each with its own source directories and repositories. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.consistency.checks` | `list of (submodule)` | Consistency checks to run |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.consistency.checks.*.frequency` | `null or string matching the pattern ([[:digit:]]+ .*)\|always` | Frequency of this type of check |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.consistency.checks.*.name` | `one of "repository", "archives", "data", "extract"` | Name of consistency check to run. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.consistency.extraConfig` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Extra settings. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.hooks.extraConfig` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Extra settings. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.location.excludeHomeManagerSymlinks` | `boolean` | Whether to exclude Home Manager generated symbolic links from the backups. This facilitates restoring the whole home directory when the Nix store doesn't contain the latest Home Manager generation. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.location.extraConfig` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Extra settings. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.location.patterns` | `null or (list of string)` | Patterns to include/exclude. See the output of `borg help patterns` for the syntax. Pattern paths are relative to `/` even when a different recursion root is set. Mutually exclusive with [](#opt-programs.borgmatic.backups._name_.location.sourceDirectories). |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.location.repositories` | `list of (string or (submodule))` | List of local or remote repositories with paths and optional labels. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.location.sourceDirectories` | `null or (list of string)` | Directories to backup. Mutually exclusive with [](#opt-programs.borgmatic.backups._name_.location.patterns). |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.output.extraConfig` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Extra settings. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.retention.extraConfig` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Extra settings. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.retention.keepDaily` | `null or signed integer` | Number of daily archives to keep. Use -1 for no limit. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.retention.keepHourly` | `null or signed integer` | Number of hourly archives to keep. Use -1 for no limit. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.retention.keepMinutely` | `null or signed integer` | Number of minutely archives to keep. Use -1 for no limit. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.retention.keepMonthly` | `null or signed integer` | Number of monthly archives to keep. Use -1 for no limit. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.retention.keepSecondly` | `null or signed integer` | Number of secondly archives to keep. Use -1 for no limit. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.retention.keepWeekly` | `null or signed integer` | Number of weekly archives to keep. Use -1 for no limit. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.retention.keepWithin` | `null or string matching the pattern [[:digit:]]+[Hdwmy]` | Keep all archives within this time interval. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.retention.keepYearly` | `null or signed integer` | Number of yearly archives to keep. Use -1 for no limit. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.storage.encryptionPasscommand` | `null or string` | Command writing the passphrase to standard output. |
| `programs.borgmatic.backups.<name>.storage.extraConfig` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Extra settings. |
| `programs.borgmatic.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Borgmatic. |
| `programs.borgmatic.package` | `null or package` | The borgmatic package to use. |
